channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bay Area parent sues California company for selling illegal e-bikes
item.description: A Fairfax resident has filed a lawsuit against an electric-bicycle manufacturer on allegations it sells vehicles that are illegal under California law.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Macdonald, The Mercury News

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Series: Leaked Renders, Specs, and More
item.description: Samsung Galaxy S25 series leaks reveal revamped camera modules, more on-board AI, and a possible super-thin Galaxy S25 Slim model.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sign PDFs easily in Preview on Apple devices
item.description: With electronic signatures becoming more common, Kurt the CyberGuy explains how to produce your digital John Hancock for online documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: I tried using Alexa and smart home devices to help fix my irregular routine – and it changed my life
item.description: Smart home devices are useful for many reasons, but for me, it’s all about getting my life in order. Here’s how automations and clever smart assistant features helped me fix my routine.
item.dc:creator: josephine.watson@futurenet.com (Josephine Watson), TechRadar

item.title: The Special Olympics embarks on digital journey to empower its athletes
item.description: The Special Olympics is overhauling its technology stack as part of a digital transformation designed to bolster the training of its athletes across the globe.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AMD in 2024: year in review
item.description: AMD had something of a mixed year, but more was happening with its CPUs compared to the firm’s graphics cards.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is data governance? Frameworks, tools, and best practices to manage data assets
item.description: Data governance definition Data governance is a system to define who within an organization has authority and control over data assets, and how those data assets may be used. It encompasses the people, processes, and technologies required to manage and protect data assets.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cómo trabaja Ikea con la IA: 30.000 empleados formados
item.description: Como la mayoría de las empresas, Ikea se centra en los datos y la inteligencia artificial (IA) para cumplir sus ambiciones de futuro. Por ello, hace cuatro años, la empresa desarrolló una estrategia de datos para todo el grupo, que se ha seguido desde entonces.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La falta de métricas de éxito de los CIO condena a muchos proyectos de IA
item.description: Según la firma de investigación IDC, muchas organizaciones han lanzado docenas de proyectos de prueba de concepto de inteligencia artificial (IA) solo para ver que un gran porcentaje fracasa, en parte porque los CIO no saben si las POC cumplen con las métricas clave.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Notable State Laws Taking Effect in 2025
item.description: A look at some of the most notable state laws taking effect in 2025, covering artificial intelligence, abortion, guns, marijuana, minimum wages, social media limits, school rules on gender, tax breaks, and voting rights.
item.dc:creator: David A. Lieb, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden
item.description: Jane Rathbun, the Department of the Navy’s CIO, said tools from NSA and NCIS along with a new initiative could help small firms meet CMMC requirements. The post Navy looking at cloud as GFE to reduce CMMC burden first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Albania to close TikTok for a year blaming it for promoting violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — Albania's prime minister said Saturday the government will shut down the video service TikTok for one year, blaming it for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KRON4
